title: Negotiation: interests not positions
subtitle: Negotiate by asking what matters.
overview: B2 negotiation looks for interests, not only demands.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: ¿Qué es lo más importante para ti?
What is most important to you?
We could look for an intermediate option.

items.es: Antes de decidir, quiero entender qué es lo más importante para ti.
items.en: Before deciding, I want to understand what is most important to you.

items.es: Mi prioridad es terminar el proyecto sin bajar la calidad.
items.en: My priority is to finish the project without lowering quality.
We could look for an intermediate option.

items.es: Si reducimos una parte, ganamos tiempo sin cambiar todo el plan.
items.en: If we reduce one part, we gain time without changing the whole plan.

items.es: Creo que esto cubriría ambas necesidades.
items.en: I think this would cover both needs.
